tasks.title: Wayland window setup

tasks.title: Basic text rendering
tasks.notes: glyphon + cosmic-text to render text in the window

tasks.title: Single terminal pane
tasks.notes: alacritty_terminal + nix PTY, render one terminal in wgpu

tasks.title: Pane grid layout
tasks.notes: Split window into N panes with thermal-colored borders

tasks.title: Multi-PTY management
tasks.notes: Spawn and manage multiple PTY sessions with epoll

tasks.title: Click-to-focus sidebar
tasks.notes: Click a pane to expand it in sidebar view

tasks.title: State tracking + thermal indicators
tasks.notes: Watch Claude hooks, color pane borders by agent state

tasks.title: Audio notifications
tasks.notes: rodio + PipeWire for state change sounds

tasks.title: Git diff awareness
tasks.notes: Watch repos for changes, surface diffs that need review
